effect: 使用控制台的 giveitem 指令给予角色不合语法的物品时，会改为给予角色一个 剧毒臭屁 。
description: Isaac farts, dealing 5 damage andpoisoningenemies around him. (马药丸: The poison affects all enemies in the room.)

effect: Deals a full heart of damage to Isaac. Using a Bad Trip pill while Isaac only has a single heart left or less turns it into a Full Health pill.This doesn't count as damage for the purposes ofDevil Room/Angel Roomgeneration odds or score reduction. (马药丸: Deals two hearts of damage. If Isaac would not survive, the pill becomes Full Health.)
description: Deals a full heart of damage to Isaac. effect: 使用后（ 大胶囊 ）： 获得 。
description: Grants Isaac two soul hearts. (马药丸: Grants four soul hearts.)

effect: Swaps the values of Isaac'sBombsandKeys.The effects ofGolden BombsandGolden Keysare also swapped. (马药丸: The number of bombs and keys is increased by 50% while swapping.)
description: Swaps the values of Isaac'sBombsandKeys.The effects ofGolden BombsandGolden Keysare also swapped. (马药丸: The number of bombs and keys is increased by 50% while swapping.)

effect: 腹泻 （俗称拉肚子，英语：diarrhea）的定义是在一天之内有软便或水便的状况而且排便三次以上，症状常持续好几天而且可能因为体液流失的关系而产生脱水现象。脱水的初期表现是皮肤失去弹性，而且人格出现变化。如果脱水的情形继续恶化，接下来可能会出现排尿量减少、肤色苍白、心跳过速、或者对外界刺激反应不佳。另外，对以母乳喂养的婴儿来说，软便可能是正常的现象。
description: Spawns a lit bomb behind Isaac every second for five seconds. (马药丸: Spawns more bombs with the effects ofMr. MegaandBobby-Bomb.)

effect: 当角色血量小于等于1颗心时， 过激幻觉 会变为 体力回满 。
description: Refills every emptyred heartcontainer. (马药丸: Fully heals and grants 3 soul hearts.)

effect: 使用后（ 大胶囊 ）： 失去2个心之容器。 若角色只有两个心之容器，失去心之容器后会获得半个魂心。 心之容器小于等于1个时，改为获得2个空的心之容器。
description: Removes one red heart container. Acts as aHealth Uppill if Isaac has one or fewer red heart containers. Characters who cannot have red heart containers will lose one heart. (马药丸: Removes two heart containers. if Isaac has 0 or 1 heart containers, the pill becomes Health Up and if he has 2 with no other types of health, they are removed and he is given half a soul heart.)

effect: Adds one empty red heart container. (马药丸: Adds two empty red heart containers.)
description: Adds one empty red heart container. (马药丸: Adds two empty red heart containers.)

effect: 使用后： 改变角色的外貌。 该效果在离开当前房间后消失。
description: Changes the appearance of Isaac's face. This pill is cosmetic only,and the effect disappears when Isaac leaves the room. (马药丸: Isaac's face gets a permanent, very exaggerated expression resembling a horse.)

effect: Causes Isaac to grow four hairs from the top of his head and zits on his face. This pill is cosmetic only and will stay for the rest of the run.Consuming three puberty pills will grant theAdulttransformation, granting one red heart container and making Isaac's voice slightly deeper (one time effect). (马药丸: Isaac gains very fluffy hair covering his entire head and even face.)

effect: 使用后（ 大胶囊 ）： 随机传送到以下房间，优先传送到未进入的房间： 宝箱房 商店 隐藏房 超级隐藏房 星象房 献祭房 挑战房 头目挑战房 赌博房 图书馆 宝库
description: Teleports Isaac to a randomroom. Has a small chance to teleport Isaac to theI AM ERRORroom, and an extremely small chance to teleport him to theBlack Market, likeUndefined.Unobtainable inGreed Mode.Using a Telepills in the mirrored version ofDownpour/DrossII has a chance to teleport Isaac to anUltra Secret Room. (马药丸: No difference.)

effect: Drops one to twoLil' Batteriesand fully charges thespacebar item.Can be used withPlaceboorD1to generate infinite batteries. (马药丸: Spawns 3-4 batteries.)

description: Sets Isaac's red heart health to 1, then spawns 1-4Red Hearts. This fills Isaac's first red heart container (even if Isaac's red health is less than 1) and empties the rest, includingBone Hearts. This effect does not count as damage. If used without any red heart containers, no health will be deducted, but red hearts will still spawn. If used in aSuper Secret Roomcontaining aBlack HeartorEternal Heart, it will spawn those types of hearts instead. (马药丸: Spawns 4-7 hearts.)

effect: 使用后（ 大胶囊 ）： 角色变为白色，在4秒内无法移动。
description: Prevents Isaac from moving and shooting for 2 seconds. (马药丸: The effect lasts 4 seconds.)

effect: 使用后（ 大胶囊 ）： 在当前楼层中，获得 思想 的效果。 其余效果同上。
description: Opens all entrances to theSecret RoomandSuper Secret Roomfor the current floor. (马药丸: In addition to the normal effect, fully reveals the map likeThe Mind.)

effect: 使用后（ 大胶囊 ）： 将当前房间中的所有敌人变为 友好 状态。
description: Charmsall enemies in the room for a short period of time. (马药丸: The charm is permanent, turning the enemiesfriendly.)

effect: 使用后（ 大胶囊 ）： 清除已记录的所有胶囊效果（使用过的胶囊将重新显示为???）。
description: Replacesthe floor mapwith a ? for the rest of the floor, identical to the effect of Curse of the Lost. If no othercursesare active for the floor, the Curse of the Lost will appear under the level name when the map key is held. This effect can be negated by picking upBlack Candle, but will not prevent future uses of the Amnesia pill from giving the Curse of the Lost effect.Also the only pill to have its flavor text appear on a piece of paper as curses do. (马药丸: No difference.)

effect: Spawnsa large yellow pool(similar toLemon Mishap) around Isaac. Greatly damages any enemy that steps on it, for 22 damage per tick or 66 damage per second. (马药丸: The puddle is larger, covering nearly the entire room if used near the center.)
description: Spawnsa large yellow pool(similar toLemon Mishap) around Isaac. Greatly damages any enemy that steps on it, for 22 damage per tick or 66 damage per second. (马药丸: The puddle is larger, covering nearly the entire room if used near the center.)

effect: Tears are shot diagonally outwards for 30 seconds, making it much harder to aim. This effect will persist between rooms until it wears off. (马药丸: The effect lasts for 60 seconds.)
description: Tears are shot diagonally outwards for 30 seconds, making it much harder to aim. This effect will persist between rooms until it wears off. (马药丸: The effect lasts for 60 seconds.)

effect: 使用后： 在当前房间中角色受到的所有伤害减半，但伤害不会降到半颗心以下。 大体型变种与骷髅变种的精英怪物造成的伤害会被降至一颗心。
description: For the duration of the room, taking damage only removes a half-heart from Isaac's HP, regardless of the source of the damage. (Similar effect toThe Wafer's)Unlocked by:CompletePAY TO PLAY (challenge #24). (马药丸: No difference.)

effect: 使用后： 在当前房间中，角色受到所有低于 \( 1 \) 颗心的伤害全部变为 \( 1 \) 颗心。
description: For the duration of the room, taking damage removes a full heart from Isaac's HP, regardless of the source of the damage. Also changes Isaac's appearance for the room.Unlocked by:CompletePAY TO PLAY (challenge #24). (马药丸: No difference.)

effect: 使用后： 角色经过的地方会生成 大便 ，持续1秒。
description: SpawnsPoopat Isaac's position for a few seconds. A higher speed stat means Isaac can cover more tiles in poop in the same time. A pun on laxatives.Unlocked by:CompleteHave a Heart (challenge #25). (马药丸: The effect lasts much longer.)

effect: Gives the Curse of the Maze effect for the remainder of the floor. The effect can stack with othercurses. If no othercursesare active for the floor, Curse of the Maze will appear under the level name when Tab is held. This effect can be negated by picking upBlack Candle, but will not prevent future uses of the ??? pill from giving the Curse of the Maze effect. As the pill's name is "???", the same as what unidentified pills are referred to, it is easy to accidentally use it more than once per run. It is recommended to memorize its color upon first using it.Unlocked by:CompleteHave a Heart (challenge #25). (马药丸: No difference.)
description: Gives the Curse of the Maze effect for the remainder of the floor. The effect can stack with othercurses. This effect can be negated by picking upBlack Candle, but will not prevent future uses of the ??? pill from giving the Curse of the Maze effect. effect: Increases Isaac's size and decreases the pitch of his voice. This effect does not increase the size of Isaac's hitbox, but increases the size ofThe Forgotten's bone club.These pills contribute to theStompytransformation. (马药丸: Size increases by two steps.)

effect: Decreases Isaac's size and increases the pitch of his voice. This effect decreases the size of Isaac's hitbox; a small enough hitbox allows Isaac to walk "under" certain projectiles to avoid them. (马药丸: Size decreases by two steps.)
description: Decreases Isaac's size and increases the pitch of his voice. This effect decreases the size of Isaac's hitbox; a small enough hitbox allows Isaac to walk "under" certain projectiles to avoid them. (马药丸: Size decreases by two steps.)

description: Applies a pixelating filter on the screen 3 times over 30 seconds. The effect continues between floors.Pixelates the screen and degrades colors for 30 seconds. (马药丸: The effect lasts 90 seconds, with no breaks.)

description: Creates a pool ofblack creepbeneath Isaac that slows enemies. (马药丸: The pool lasts much longer.)

effect: 使用后： 当前房间中所有敌人和 角色本身获得 减速 效果。 减速效果持续至离开当前房间。 背景音乐变慢。

(马药丸: Applies theStop Watcheffect for the rest of the floor.)

effect: 在与 妈妈 及其精英变种的战斗中触发 好兴奋！！！ 的效果时，妈妈不再会使用践踏和生成怪物的攻击方式，这将使得角色很难有机会攻击到她。
description: Increases the speed of all enemies for the duration of the room.Increases the speed of all enemies, Isaac, and the background music for the duration of the room.The effect triggers again three additional times. (马药丸: No difference.)

description: Increases oneattributeand decreases another randomly, with the same power as normal attribute up/down pills. Will not reduce any attributes if taken withLucky Foot,PHDorVirgo. Will not increase any attribute if taken withFalse PHD. If a pill-improving item is combined with False PHD, the pill gives an attribute increase, a decrease and a damage up. (马药丸: The two effects are doubled in power.)

effect: 使用后（ 塔罗牌桌布 ）： 同上，没有额外效果。

description: Grantshoming tearsfor the current room.Grantshoming tearsand +3Rangefor the current room.

effect: 使用后： 如果房间中没有下列物品，则生成1个 硬币 ；否则将所有下列物品根据种类转化为 \( n \) 个 硬币 ，其中 \( n \) 与物品种类有关： 道具： \( n=15 \) ； 永恒之心 、 金心 、 金钥匙 、 钥匙圈 、 充能钥匙 、 金炸弹 、 双炸弹 、 巨型炸弹 ： \( n=10 \) ； 福袋 ： \( n=7 \) ； 双红心 、 黑心 、 骨心 ： \( n=6 \) ； 魂心 、 钥匙 、 炸弹 、 胶囊 、 电池 、 卡牌 、 饰品 ： \( n=5 \) ； 红心 、 胆小的红心 、 混合心 ： \( n=3 \) ； 半魂心 、 腐心 ： \( n=2 \) ； 半红心 ： \( n=1 \) ；
description: Teleports Isaac to theShop.

effect: Deals 40 damage to all enemies in the room.
description: Deals 40 damage to all enemies in the room.

effect: 角色被传送到 究极隐藏房 后，如果该究级隐藏房尚未有任何出口，会随机开启一个与其和一个普通房间都相邻的红色房间，以供角色离开。
description: Teleports Isaac to theSecret Room. Opens one random wall inside the Secret Room, so Isaac can leave even if he doesn't have anyBombs. Randomly chooses a Secret Room if there are multiple (viaFragmented Cardand/orLuna).

effect: 使用后（ 塔罗牌桌布 ）： 回复所有红心容器。 对当前房间中的所有敌人造成2次 \( 200.00 \) 点伤害。 在地图上显示除 超级隐藏房 与 究极隐藏房 以外所有的房间的图标和位置。 解除当前楼层的 黑暗诅咒！ 。
description: Restores Isaac to fullhealth, deals 100 damage to all enemies in the room, and reveals the map for the current floor, except for theSuper Secret RoomandUltra Secret Room.RemovesCurse of  Darknessfor the current floor.

effect: 使用后（ 塔罗牌桌布 ）： 触发2次 XX-审判？ 的使用效果。
description: Spawns aBeggaror aDevil Beggarnear Isaac. Has a 2% chance to spawn aBattery Bum,Rotten Beggar,Key Master, orBomb Buminstead.

effect: 使用后（ 塔罗牌桌布 ）： 同上，没有额外效果。
description: Reveals the entire floor, except for theSuper Secret RoomandUltra Secret Room.

effect: 使用后（ 塔罗牌桌布 ）： 同上，没有额外效果。
description: Drops allHeartsandpickupsIsaac currently possesses on the floor, leaving Isaac at half a heart. Pickups may be dropped as items such asA QuarterandBoom!.

effect: 使用后： 在当前房间中，获得 弯勺魔术 的效果。 射程 \( +3.00 \) 多个 I-魔术师 的该效果不叠加。
description: Grants a repelling blue aura for one minute, likeThe Soulbut stronger and with a wider area of effect.

effect: Mom's leg starts stomping down repeatedly (targeting Isaac, not the enemies) for one minute, like holdingBroken Shovel.
description: Mom's leg starts stomping down repeatedly (targeting Isaac, not the enemies) for one minute, like holdingBroken Shovel.

effect: Grants 2 temporaryRed Heart Containers, +1.5Fire Rate, and -0.1Speedfor one minute, along withMagdalene's hairstyle. The effect does not stack with itself. When the effect ends, if the removal of the Heart Containers would kill Isaac, he is left with one instead.
description: Grants 2 temporaryRed Heart Containers, +1.5Fire Rate, and -0.1Speedfor one minute, along withMagdalene's hairstyle. The effect does not stack with itself. When the effect ends, if the removal of the Heart Containers would kill Isaac, he is left with one instead.

effect: 使用后： 传送到当前层的 头目房 。 如果当前层有多个 头目房 ，则随机传送到其中一个。 如果当前层没有 头目房 ，则随机传送到一个房间。
description: Teleports Isaac into an extraBoss Roomfrom the boss pool two floors deeper than the current floor (but never a final boss). The boss will drop a reward. Exiting the room returns Isaac to where he used the card.

effect: 使用后（ 塔罗牌桌布 ）： 生成3个 骨心 。
description: Drops 2Bone Heartson the ground.

effect: 使用后（ 塔罗牌桌布 ）： 生成 \( 3 \) 个 红心 。
description: Creates a random item from the current room's item pool. Turns oneRed Heart Containeror twoSoul Heartsinto aBroken Heart.

effect: 使用后（ 塔罗牌桌布 ）： 触发 \( 2 \) 次 VII-战车 的使用效果。
description: Isaac becomes an invincible statue with 4× fire rate for 10 seconds. The statue can be nudged slightly by moving and is affected by knockback.

effect: 使用后（ 塔罗牌桌布 ）： 生成 \( 4 \) ~ \( 14 \) 个 金箱子 。
description: Creates 2 to 4Locked Chestsnear Isaac.

effect: 使用后： 如果房间中没有下列物品，则生成1个 硬币 ；否则将所有下列物品根据种类转化为 \( n \) 个 硬币 ，其中 \( n \) 与物品种类有关： 道具： \( n=15 \) ； 永恒之心 、 金心 、 金钥匙 、 钥匙圈 、 充能钥匙 、 金炸弹 、 双炸弹 、 巨型炸弹 ： \( n=10 \) ； 福袋 ： \( n=7 \) ； 双红心 、 黑心 、 骨心 ： \( n=6 \) ； 魂心 、 钥匙 、 炸弹 、 胶囊 、 电池 、 卡牌 、 饰品 ： \( n=5 \) ； 红心 、 胆小的红心 、 混合心 ： \( n=3 \) ； 半魂心 、 腐心 ： \( n=2 \) ； 半红心 ： \( n=1 \) ；
description: Turns items and pickups in the room intoCoins, matching their normal shop price. If there is nothing to sell, drops aPenny.

effect: 使用后（ 塔罗牌桌布 ）： 触发2次 X-命运之轮？ 的使用效果。
description: Invokes a randomDice Roomeffect.

effect: All enemies in the room are weakened, becomingslowand taking double damage. The effect lasts up to one minute or until the room is left.
description: All enemies in the room are weakened, becomingslowand taking double damage. The effect lasts up to one minute or until the room is left.

effect: 使用后： 获得以下效果，持续30秒： 角色的形象变为 店主 。 移速 \( -0.10 \) 获得 内眼 的效果。 每当角色消灭敌人时，生成1个 硬币 。
description: Isaac turns visually intoKeeperfor 30 seconds, with triple shot and -0.1Speed. Killed enemies drop randomCoins.

effect: Creates afriendlyBonyor temporary bone orbital for each enemy killed in the current room.
description: Creates afriendlyBonyor temporary bone orbital for each enemy killed in the current room.

effect: 使用后（ 塔罗牌桌布 ）： 触发2次 XIV-节制？ 的使用效果。
description: Forces Isaac to eat 5 randomPillsin quick succession.

effect: InvokesThe Bible(which can killMom). GrantsFlightand spawns aSeraphimfamiliar for 30 seconds.
description: InvokesThe Bible(which can killMom). GrantsFlightand spawns aSeraphimfamiliar for 30 seconds.

effect: 使用后（ 塔罗牌桌布 ）： 触发 \( 2 \) 次 XVI-塔 的使用效果。
description: Creates 7 clusters of randomrocksand other obstacles. Spawned clusters will often containtinted rocks, with the possibility of finding more than one in the same room. The pathways between exits can't be blocked.

effect: 使用后（ 塔罗牌桌布 ）： 传送到当前层的 宝箱房 。 如果是首次进入这个宝箱房，则这个宝箱房必定为有二选一道具的房间布局。 如果当前楼层有 星象房 ，则传送到当前层的星象房。
description: Removes Isaac's oldest passive item (ignoring starting items) and creates 2 random items from the current room's item pool. Does nothing if Isaac has no items.

effect: 角色被传送到 究极隐藏房 后，如果该究级隐藏房尚未有任何出口，会随机开启一个与其和一个普通房间都相邻的红色房间，以供角色离开。
description: Teleports Isaac to theUltra Secret Room. The pathway back to the normal rooms will be made ofRed Rooms.

effect: 使用后（ 塔罗牌桌布 ）： 回复所有红心容器。 对当前房间中的所有敌人造成2次 \( 200.00 \) 点伤害。 在地图上显示除 超级隐藏房 与 究极隐藏房 以外所有的房间的图标和位置。 解除当前楼层的 黑暗诅咒！ 。
description: GainSpirit of the Nightand +1.5Damagefor the current floor. Turns Isaac's Red Hearts into Bone Hearts, but they revert once the effect ends. Also causesCurse of  Darknessthat cannot be dispelled.

effect: 使用后（ 塔罗牌桌布 ）： 触发2次 XX-审判？ 的使用效果。
description: Creates aShop Restock Machinenear Isaac.

effect: 使用后（ 塔罗牌桌布 ）： 同上，没有额外效果。
description: Creates a trap door which always leads to aCrawl Space.

effect: Doubles Isaac'sBombs. If he has no bombs, gives him 2 instead.
description: Doubles Isaac'sBombs. If he has no bombs, gives him 2 instead.

effect: 使用后： 如果角色有 硬币 ，则硬币个数 \( \times 2 \) ；否则硬币个数 \( +2 \)
description: Doubles Isaac'sPenny. If he has no coins, gives him 2 instead.

effect: Doubles Isaac'sKeys. If he has no keys, gives him 2 instead.
description: Doubles Isaac'sKeys. If he has no keys, gives him 2 instead.

effect: Doubles Isaac's current number ofRed Hearts. Doesn't add new Red Heart containers, just fills empty ones. If Isaac has only empty Red Heart containers, he is healed for 1 Red Heart.DoublesTainted Bethany's Blood Charges.
description: Doubles Isaac's current number ofRed Hearts. Doesn't add new Red Heart containers, just fills empty ones. If Isaac has only empty Red Heart containers, he is healed for 1 Red Heart.DoublesTainted Bethany's Blood Charges.

effect: Turns allPickups,Chests, andnon-boss enemies in the room into randomBombpickups, includingTroll Bombs.
description: Turns allPickups,Chests, andnon-boss enemies in the room into randomBombpickups, includingTroll Bombs.

effect: 使用后： 将房间中的 所有 掉落物 所有 掉落物 和 怪物 变为 硬币 。
description: Turns allPickups,Chests, andnon-boss enemies in the room into randomCoinpickups.

effect: 使用后： 将房间中的 所有 掉落物 所有 掉落物 和 怪物 变为 钥匙 。
description: Turns allPickups,Chests, andnon-boss enemies in the room into randomKeypickups.

effect: 使用后： 将房间中的 所有 掉落物 所有 掉落物 和 怪物 变为 随机心 。
description: Turns allPickups,Chests, andnon-boss enemies in the room into randomHearts.

effect: Teleports Isaac to theDevil RoomorAngel Room.
description: Teleports Isaac to theDevil RoomorAngel Room.

effect: 解锁 自杀之王 的成就的背景颜色和用某个角色通过 头目车轮战 的成就的背景颜色是相同的。有可能最初是要用某个角色通过 头目车轮战 才能解锁 自杀之王 。 很有可能是 拉撒路 ，因为 成就/105 的背景颜色和其他挑战奖励的背景颜色是一样的。
description: Kills Isaac and spawns lots of Pickups, items, and/or Chests in the same room.

effect: 用 堕化抹大拉 获得超级撒但通关标记。
description: Drops 1-20 fullRed Heartson the ground.

effect: 该卡牌来源于《 万智牌 》中的卡牌： 混沌法球（Chaos Orb） 。其以怪异的效果而出名：从至少一英尺高度扔下混沌法球，如果至少完全翻转一次，则消灭碰到的所有卡牌及其本身。
description: Throws the card in the direction Isaac is moving, which opens doors, breaks obstacles, and instantly kills any enemy in its path.

effect: 使用后： 在当前房间中，获得以下效果： 伤害修正 \( +7.00 \) 射程 \( +30.00 \) 射程 \( +3.00 \) 角色能够摧毁碰到的可摧毁的障碍物。 角色的体型变大（1.6倍）。 多个 变巨术 的该效果不叠加。
description: For the current room, makes Isaac larger, allows him to crushobstacleshe walks on, and grants +7 flatDamageand +30Range.For the current room, makes Isaac larger, allows him to crushobstacleshe walks on, and grants +7 flatDamageand +3Range.

effect: 该卡牌来源于《 万智牌 》中的卡牌： 先人的召还（Ancestral Recall） ，效果为“目标牌手抓三张牌”。
description: Spawns 3 random cards.

effect: 该卡牌的描述来源于万智牌中的另一张卡牌： 品味当下（Savor the Moment） ，与时间行走具有同一类效果，都是进行一个额外的回合。 与 变巨术 和 先祖召唤 不同， 时空漫步 没有使用时间行走在 第一版 的插画，而是使用了 特选大师 以及 2011年特选冠军赛赠卡 重印的插画。
description: For the current room, enemies are slowed, Isaac's speed is increased by 0.50, and his shot speed is decreased by 1.00.

effect: 使用后： 将当前房间中的所有商店交易与恶魔交易物品变为可直接拾取的物品。
description: Makes allpickupsanditemsthat cost money or health in the room free.

effect: Displays a cryptic statement on the screen, similar to aFortune Telling Machine. These messages (often) provide hints on bosses, bonus areas, etc.
description: Displays a cryptic statement on the screen, similar to aFortune Telling Machine. These messages (often) provide hints on bosses, bonus areas, etc.

effect: When used, copies the effect of Isaac's currently heldactivated collectible.
description: When used, copies the effect of Isaac's currently heldactivated collectible.

effect: 弥达斯之触 ：生成的大便有概率变为金大便。可覆盖前者。 当 幸运为0点时，概率为 \( 11 \% \) 。当 幸运为18点或以上时，概率达到 \( 100\% \) 。
description: Covers the entire room withPoop. The process is not instant, and the room will not get filled if Isaac leaves before it's done filling.

name_en: Get out of Jail Free Card
effect: 使用后： 触发1次 爸爸的钥匙 的使用效果。
description: Upon use, opens all doors in the current room, exactly likeDad's Key.

effect: 不与 木十字架 的圣盾叠加。 木十字架 的圣盾存在时使用 神圣卡 ，可以在当前房间额外获得1层圣盾。如果未消耗圣盾离开房间则圣盾恢复为1层；如果消耗1层或者2层护盾则离开房间后失去护盾效果。 神圣卡 与 木十字架 的圣盾可以叠加。
description: Grants a shield that blocks the next hostile damage that would be taken in the currentroom. Has a chance to spawn another Holy Card on use.Grants a shield that blocks the next hostile damage that would be taken.

effect: 若上一次使用的物品是 红钥匙 / 红钥匙碎片 ，则只有在拥有 红钥匙 / 红钥匙碎片 时才能触发效果。
description: When used, copies the effect of the most recently usedPill,Card, Rune, Soul Stone, oractivated item.

effect: Destroys all breakable objects in the room. Does not affect Key Blocks.
description: Destroys all breakable objects in the room. Does not affect Key Blocks.

effect: Clones allpickupsandChestsin the room (includingShoppickups; the clones can then be picked up for free). Cloned chests will contain exactly the same type of items: if the original contains a pickup, so will the clone; the same is true forcollectibles. Cannot clone other Jera runes and trinkets.
description: Clones allpickupsandChestsin the room (includingShoppickups; the clones can then be picked up for free). Cloned chests will contain exactly the same type of items: if the original contains a pickup, so will the clone; the same is true forcollectibles. Cannot clone other Jera runes and trinkets.

effect: Creates a trapdoor leading to the next floor. Has an estimated 1/12 (8%) chance to create a trapdoor leading to aCrawl Spaceinstead.Guaranteed to create a trap door to aCrawl Spaceif used on floor tiles containing certain patterns. Will not create trapdoors if used on the end floor of a challenge.
description: Creates a trapdoor leading to the next floor. Has an estimated 1/12 (8%) chance to create a trapdoor leading to aCrawl Spaceinstead.Guaranteed to create a trap door to aCrawl Spaceif used on floor tiles containing certain patterns. Will not create trapdoors if used on the end floor of a challenge.

effect: Removes anyCursesfrom the current floor and grants aSoul Heart. (This will not removeCurse of the Labyrinth.)
description: Removes anyCursesfrom the current floor and grants aSoul Heart. (This will not removeCurse of the Labyrinth.)

effect: Reveals the whole map, including theSecret Roomand theSuper Secret Room. (This will not removeCurse of the Lost.)Does not reveal theUltra Secret Room
description: Reveals the whole map, including theSecret Roomand theSuper Secret Room. (This will not removeCurse of the Lost.)Does not reveal theUltra Secret Room

effect: Rerolls all item pedestals in the room (the same effect asThe D6).
description: Rerolls all item pedestals in the room (the same effect asThe D6).

effect: Summons 3 friendlyBlue Fliesand 3 friendlyBlue Spiders.
description: Summons 3 friendlyBlue Fliesand 3 friendlyBlue Spiders.

effect: Grants ashieldwhich lasts for 30 seconds.Grants ashieldwhich lasts for 20 seconds.
description: Grants ashieldwhich lasts for 30 seconds.Grants ashieldwhich lasts for 20 seconds.

effect: 使用后，随机触发一个其他符文的效果， \( 25 \% \) 概率掉落一个空白符文。 若会生成空白符文，则会首先生成空白符文再触发其他符文的效果。
description: Grants a random rune effectexcluding Black Rune. Has a 25% chance to drop another Blank Rune on the ground upon use.

effect: 使用后： 对房间中的所有敌人造成 \( 40.00 \) 点伤害（ 死灵之书 的使用效果）； 将房间中的所有掉落物随机变为蓝苍蝇或蓝蜘蛛； 当前房间内的掉落物过多的话，将只会转换一部分。 每吞噬一个道具，便会随机增加角色的两项属性： 移速 \( +0.20 \) 射程 \( +0.50 \) 射程 \( +2.50 \) 射速 \( +0.50 \) 射速修正 \( +0.50 \) 弹速 \( +0.20 \) 伤害修正 \( +1.00 \) 幸运 \( +1.00 \)
description: Deals 40 damage to all enemies in the room. Consumes all pickups in the room and turns them into Blue Flies and Spiders. Consumes all pedestal items in the room and turns them into random stat upgrades.

effect: 使用后，随机触发一个弱化版的其他符文的效果。 冰雹符文 ：破坏一些石头。 收获符文 ：触发一次 一面骰 的效果。 马骑符文 ：生成一个 活板门 。 朝夕符文 ：获得半个魂心，不移除诅咒。 诸神符文 ：显示正方向三个房间远的地图，能在地图上显示 究极隐藏房 的位置。 签筒符文 ：重置房间内的一个道具，有50%概率将道具重置为 大便 。 桦木符文 ： 生成一只蓝苍蝇和一只蓝蜘蛛。 在当前房间中，生成1个 无底坑蝗虫 。 保护符文 ：获得持续3秒的护盾。
description: Activates a random, weak rune effect: Algiz grants a 3 second shield, Ansuz reveals the map up to 3 rooms away (includingUltra Secret Room), Berkano gives 1 blue fly and spider, Dagaz gives half a Soul Heart, Ehwaz makes a trapdoor, Hagalaz destroys some rocks, Jera duplicates one pickup, and Perthro rerolls one item.

effect: 使用后： 当前房间中的所有道具增加一个选项，每1秒切换一次，离开该房间仍然生效。 多次使用会为道具添加多个可选择的选择。
description: Rerolls the items in the room likeThe D6, but they cycle back to their original form after one second, repeating. If more uses are stacked, an additional item per use will be cycled through.

effect: 使用后： 在当前房间中，每当敌人死亡时，生成一个半红心，2秒后消失。
description: Surrounds Isaac with a bubbling red aura for the current room. All enemies killed dropHalf Red Heartsthat disappear in 2 seconds.

effect: 使用后： 触发1次 爸爸的钥匙 的使用效果。 在当前房间周围可以生成红色房间的位置生成红色房间，并打开这些红色房间的所有门。
description: Opens all doors in the room. Additionally, creates aRed Roomlike theRed Keyon all valid walls. This also destroys the mirror located inDownpour/DrossII.

effect: 使用后： 冻结所有实体与泪弹直到 犹大的魂石 使用完毕。 角色进入潜行状态（ dark arts ），持续3秒： 潜行状态下的角色获得 移速+1.00 潜行状态下的角色不会受到伤害，并且可以穿过敌人及其泪弹。 每当角色脱离潜行状态时： 本次潜行状态下，对于第 \( n \) 个静止状态的敌人或其泪弹： 如果是敌人，则对该敌人造成 \( d_n = 200 \% 角色伤害 + 3.50 n \) 的伤害； 如果是敌人的泪弹，则阻挡该泪弹。 对角色周围的敌人造成 \( D = \sum_{n=1}^{N} d_n \) 的伤害。 使角色获得 \( 4N \) 层 dark arts secondary 状态。 dark arts secondary 状态每30帧(每0.5秒)减少1层。 每有1层 dark arts secondary 状态，角色获得 伤害+0.25。
description: Increases Isaac'sspeedand makes him invulnerable for 3 seconds and allows him to pass through enemies. Damages all enemies and destroys all projectiles Isaac ran through when the effect ends, and grants a temporaryDamagebonus for each enemy and projectile hit.

effect: Causes 8poisonfarts that leave lingering browncreep, then plants a trail of 7Butt Bombsin quick succession. Standing on the creep gives +1.5Fire Rateand +1Damage.
description: Causes 8poisonfarts that leave lingering browncreep, then plants a trail of 7Butt Bombsin quick succession. Standing on the creep gives +1.5Fire Rateand +1Damage.

effect: 使用后： 在当前房间中，生成15个 死鸟 跟班。 死鸟跟班会追逐敌人，对接触的敌人造成伤害。 如果当前房间中没有敌人，死鸟跟班会停留10秒后消失；否则会在消灭所有敌人后消失。
description: 14Dead Birdfamiliars fly in and attack enemies. They leave after all enemies are dead or Isaac leaves the room.

effect: 用 堕化参孙 获得Boss Rush和死寂通关标记。
description: Isaac turns berserk for 10 seconds, replacing his tears with a melee bone club and gaining +0.4Speed, someTears, and +3 flatDamage.

effect: 用 堕化阿撒泻勒 获得Boss Rush和死寂通关标记。
description: ActivatesMega Blastfor 7.5 seconds.

effect: 如果人物拥有 新手牌组 / 多指畸形 等可以同时拥有两个消耗品的道具，即使 拉撒路的魂石 在副消耗品栏，在死亡时也会自动消耗并触发复活效果。
description: Isaac dies, and is immediately revived at half a Heart in the same room, with some invincibility time. The soul stone is automatically used upon taking fatal damage. Has the highest priority of allRevival items.

effect: UsesThe D6andD20. The rerolled items use random pools, as ifChaoswere active.
description: UsesThe D6andD20. The rerolled items use random pools, as ifChaoswere active.

effect: 使用后： 在当前房间中，人物进入 游魂诅咒 状态并获得临时的 神圣屏障 效果。
description: Isaac "dies" and turns into a ghost for the current room, with all ofThe Lost's benefits and weaknesses. TheHoly Mantleeffect gained from this can be stacked with multiple uses.

effect: 与生成道具不同，使用该卡牌会直接将道具置入角色的道具栏。 给予的道具可以发挥与正常道具相同的效果，包括获得 套装 进度。 给予的道具不会影响对应道具的权重。 因此可能给予角色重复的道具。 给予的道具无视生成道具的限制，如可以使 堕化游魂 获得 灵能苍蝇 。
description: Adds one permanentfamiliarfrom theBaby Shop pool, exceptStitches. Can give familiars that Isaac already has.Unique familiarscan be received only once.

effect: Drops 1-25 randomCoinson the ground.
description: Drops 1-25 randomCoinson the ground.

effect: Spawns 15 randomlocusts.
description: Spawns 15 randomlocusts.

effect: 使用后： 生成 遗骸 作为临时副人物。 生成的 遗骸 只会挥击，造成 \( 65.25 \) 点伤害。
description: SpawnsThe Forgottenas a temporary secondary character, controlled at the same time as Isaac. He dies with no consequences if his health run out, and disappears when Isaac leaves the room. The bone swing deals high damage, and reflects tears.

effect: 使用后： 生成 \( 6 \) 个中圈的 魂火跟班 （类似于 美德之书 ）。
description: Spawns 6Book of Virtueswisps with random properties.

effect: 使用后： 生成 以扫 作为临时副人物。 以扫会获得随机与角色道具数量相同且道具池相同的被动道具，并触发这些道具的拾取效果， 同时根据这些道具的 生成降权 ，分别降低它们在道具池中的权重。 以扫的初始血量为 \( 1 \) 个心之容器和 \( 1 \) 个魂心。
description: SpawnsEsauas a temporary secondary character, controlled at the same time as Isaac. He dies with no consequences if his health runs out, and disappears when Isaac leaves the room. Esau has random items equal to the number of items Isaac has, each based on the pools of the items Isaac's were obtained from.

effect: Upon use, invokes the effects ofThe D6and theD20at the same time, re-rolling all item pedestals and pickups in the room.
description: Upon use, invokes the effects ofThe D6and theD20at the same time, re-rolling all item pedestals and pickups in the room.

effect: When used, will cause twoMom's Handsto come down and grab two random enemies, dealing damage and, if they have 40 or more HP, pinning them to the ground temporarily.
description: When used, will cause twoMom's Handsto come down and grab two random enemies, dealing damage and, if they have 40 or more HP, pinning them to the ground temporarily.

effect: 红钥匙碎片 可以使角色在没有获得 红钥匙 的情况下在 家 中解锁堕化人物。 在解锁 红钥匙碎片 后，角色可在拾取 爸爸的便条 之前的任意一个 头目房 或 宝箱房 中（包括获得爸爸的便条的房间）丢弃饰品，从而在回溯中获得 红钥匙碎片 。 一局游戏中可能一个饰品都未生成。不过角色可以通过连续无伤通过三层来生成 满分考卷 从而避免这种情况的发生。 在角色拾取爸爸的便条并开始回溯后，之前丢弃的饰品会转化为 红钥匙碎片 。
description: Creates a room adjacent to a viable wall, likeRed Key.
